title: Bareket Observatory
body: The Bareket Observatory (IAU code B35; 35.0317°N  Parallax sinφ 0.84991 cosφ +0.52524) is an astronomical educational observatory owned and operated by the Bareket family. It is located east of the city of Maccabim,  near Modiin.
